object_a.label: cabinet
object_a.description: dark wood upper and lower kitchen cabinetry along the right wall
object_a.long_form_open_description: Continuous run of dark-stained wood cabinets with shaker-style or flat-panel doors stretching along the right side of the kitchen; upper cabinets mounted on wall, lower cabinets under countertop, hardware appears dark or metal; finish contrasts with lighter walls and countertop.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: runs from near the island along the right wall toward the fridge and stove

object_b.label: cabinet
object_b.description: dark wood upper and lower kitchen cabinets
object_b.long_form_open_description: Continuous run of dark-stained wood cabinets along the right wall above and below the countertop. Shaker-style or raised panel fronts, warm brown finish, consistent hardware not strongly visible; cabinets extend from the fridge area to the right edge of the frame.
